summary: Iteration 230: Tested Finance Manager Dashboard (Phase 3 of Unified Access Model). All 15 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI flows verified successfully. Finance Manager sees 'Financial Control Center' dashboard with amber gradient, 6 KPIs, charts, and finance-specific sections. Regression tests confirm Admin and Sales Manager dashboards still work correctly.

tests: Finance Manager login via /api/auth/login with finance@konekt.co.tz / Finance123! - returns role 'finance_manager'
Finance Manager login via /api/admin/auth/login - allowed (role in gate list)
GET /api/auth/me returns correct role for finance_manager
Finance Manager redirected to /admin after login
GET /api/admin/dashboard/finance-kpis returns 200
Response has finance_kpis object with all required fields
Response has payment_status_breakdown array
Response has invoice_breakdown array
Response has top_revenue_sources array
Response has risky_discounts array
Response has commission_by_rep array
Response has charts with cash_flow_trend and margin_trend
Finance Manager badge shows 'Finance Manager' in amber color (bg-amber-100 text-amber-700)
Settings link hidden in profile dropdown for Finance Manager
Invoices quick action present
Payments quick action present
Orders quick action present
Discount Analytics quick action present
Admin login still works correctly
Admin sees 'Control Center' hero (not Financial or Team)
Admin sees ALL 11 sidebar sections
Admin role badge shows 'admin' in red
Admin sees Settings link in profile dropdown
Sales Manager login still works correctly
Sales Manager sees 'Team Command Center' hero with teal gradient
Sales Manager KPI row present
Sales Manager role badge shows 'Sales Manager' in teal
Sales Manager Settings link hidden in profile dropdown

seed_data_creation: Finance Manager user seeded via startup_event in server.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified Access Model Phase 3 (Finance Manager Dashboard) fully implemented and tested. Finance Manager sees 'Financial Control Center' dashboard with amber gradient, 6 KPIs (Total Revenue, Collected, Pending Payments, Outstanding Invoices, Commission Payable, Net Margin), Cash Flow Trend chart, Payment Status pie chart, Margin Trend line chart, Invoice Breakdown, Top Revenue Sources, Commission Tracking table, High-Risk Discounts section, and Quick Actions. Sidebar shows Dashboard, Commerce, Finance, Reports & Analytics. Role badge is amber. Settings link hidden in profile dropdown. All three dashboards (Admin, Sales Manager, Finance Manager) render correctly based on role.
